About Clozd

Listen to Your Customers.
No Cap.

Clozd helps you get real buyer feedback—so your team can move past cope, cut through the noise,
and understand what buyers actually cared about.

Because "we definitely know why we lost" is sometimes giving fiction.

Get the Real Story
Our Story

It Started With a Simple Question: Do We Actually Know Anything?

Clozd was founded by people who had spent years in sales, marketing, and product—sitting in deal reviews where everyone had a strong take on what happened.

And honestly? A lot of it sounded pretty valid.

The only issue: it wasn't always true.

So instead of building on vibes, we tried something radical: we talked to the buyers.

Not a survey. Not a form fill. Not some checkbox recap that tells you almost nothing. Actual conversations with the people who made the decision.

And once we did that, the pattern was hard to ignore. Teams thought they knew why they won. They thought they knew why they lost. But a lot of the time, they were missing the real story—or giving main character energy when the facts were saying something else.

So we built Clozd around a better approach: real conversations, honest feedback, and insights grounded in what buyers actually experienced.

Because when companies rely only on internal opinions to explain deal outcomes, the odds of getting it wrong are… not low.

Our Values

No NPCs Allowed

We take the work seriously. We just don't believe bland corporate robot is a personality.

Big Picture Energy

We look ahead and see what's possible—in our market, our team, and ourselves. We're not here to play small or settle for mid.

We Follow Through

We're accountable and serious about doing great work. No disappearing, no coasting, no "circle back" energy.

Don't Fumble the Bag

We use time and resources carefully. Nothing wasted. Nothing getting cooked on our watch.

Don't Give Folks the Ick

We care about people. We listen, support, and show up with respect.

Be Real

No corporate-core performance. We value real over polished.

No Spin. Just Facts.

We tell the truth, even when it's uncomfortable. Clarity and honesty matter.

🎉

Okay, Bet. Real Talk.

Yes, this is an April Fools joke.

No, Clozd is not actually rebranding into a full-time Gen Z-core buyer feedback platform.

But we are still very serious about helping companies get honest, high-quality feedback from their buyers so they can make better decisions and win more.

Thanks for letting us have this one.

This rebrand tested extremely well with absolutely no one.
